reason: This tweet perfectly encapsulates the 'being early' and 'from obscurity to glory' narrative, which is a foundational aspiration in the meme coin and crypto space. The phrase 'obscurity phase' is highly memeable, representing the pre-pump, pre-mainstream period that early adopters cherish. It taps into the desire to be part of something before it explodes, fostering a sense of exclusive foresight and future 'I told you so' moments. The self-aware, almost prophetic tone resonates strongly with the 'we were here before it was cool' ethos.
